svg.text: Truss frame TN2-1 — matching real assembly
Galv finish · all lips facing same direction · green-capped self-drilling screws at each junction (3 × Ø3.8mm pattern)
10 members · 9 junction nodes · 27 screws total (down from ~70 in current FrameCAD spec)

Bright top edge of each member = the LIP strip on the open-channel side (lips all facing same direction). Green discs = self-drilling screws (visible cap, like the photo). Real concrete-floor background.
